title: $concat
text: $concat Concatenate up to 5 strings. $concat ( String1 , String2 { , String3 { , String4 { , String5 }}} ) Example: vResult = $concat(vString1,vString2) Parameters Table 1. Parameters Parameter Data Type Description Source String First string to which other strings are added. StringN String String to be concatenated with the previous string. Return Values Concatenated string. Use Allowed in all component types. vString1="Uniface " vString2="is " vString3="great" vString4=$concat(vString1, vString3, vString3) ; vString4 now contains "Uniface is great" Copy Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
